title: Build Rust backend with Tokio and Actix-web
description: Build REST API backend in Rust using Tokio and Actix-web. Include SQLite DB with SQLx, user auth (registration/login), posts (140 char limit), images, likes, follows, timeline, search, profile endpoints. Default admin user admin/admin.

title: Build React frontend with Bun, Vite, TypeScript and TanStack
description: Build React frontend using Bun, Vite, TypeScript. Use TanStack Router, TanStack Query, TanStack Form as much as possible. Features: registration, login, timeline, profile, search, follow, like, post with 140 char limit and image upload.
